title: Camera drag pan zoom and reset controls
summary: Add camera drag panning, wheel zoom, keyboard movement, reset and bounds behavior that works in windowed and fullscreen-equivalent layouts.
acceptance: Mouse drag pans the map without breaking click selection
Wheel zoom and keyboard movement remain bounded and deterministic from read-model geometry
A reset control or keyboard reset returns to fitted viewport
Camera interactions update localized input feedback visible in the HUD
Renderer/unit/E2E tests cover drag, zoom, keyboard and reset behavior

history.details: Implemented camera drag pan, wheel zoom, keyboard movement, Home/0 reset, HUD input routing fixes and localized camera feedback; focused unit/E2E, full web-shell E2E and quality gates passed; web-shell unit filter limitation recorded.

verified: No blocking findings; diff stays renderer/UI/Web only, camera drag/wheel/keyboard/reset behavior is covered by supplied and focused check evidence, and scoped quality gates passed except the recorded unsupported web-shell unit-filter shape.
Verified camera controls integrated after handoff/task validation, diff check and full quality gate passed; reviewer confirmed no blocking findings.

forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes

review.summary: No blocking findings; diff stays renderer/UI/Web only, camera drag/wheel/keyboard/reset behavior is covered by supplied and focused check evidence, and scoped quality gates passed except the recorded unsupported web-shell unit-filter shape.

integration.summary: Verified camera controls integrated after handoff/task validation, diff check and full quality gate passed; reviewer confirmed no blocking findings.
